hero.title: Lift your nose shape
hero.desc: A higher bridge. A sharper tip. A cleaner side profile. Fast treatment, low downtime, and natural-looking refinement.

what.title: What is a
what.desc: A minimally invasive treatment that uses absorbable threads to improve the look of your nose bridge and tip. The threads act like a scaffold under the skin to support the new shape.
what.ideal1: A flatter bridge that looks low in photos
what.ideal2: A tip that looks soft or slightly droopy
what.ideal4: A profile that needs sharper definition

results.title: Realistic results,
results.desc: Be honest with yourself here. Nose threads are not magic, but they can create beautiful subtle improvements.
results.can1: Create a more defined bridge line
results.can2: Give a slightly higher bridge appearance
results.can3: Help the tip look more lifted and projected
results.cannot1: Make a very wide nose become narrow

timeline.title: Your journey,
timeline.desc: What you see, and when you see it - a calm, real timeline from day 1 to day 14
timeline.day1Desc: Bridge looks sharper right away. Some swelling expected.
timeline.day2Desc: Swelling is common. Mild bruising can happen. Most return to daily activities within 1-2 days.
timeline.day3Desc: The nose looks more settled. The result looks more 'yours'.

faq.q1: What does a nose thread lift do?
faq.a1: It enhances the nose bridge and tip using absorbable threads to improve contour without surgery.
faq.a2: Many clinics state results usually last between 12 and 18 months, depending on thread type and individual factors.
faq.a3: Discomfort is usually minimal because local anaesthesia is used.
faq.a4: Not always. Some noses cannot safely take many threads, and assessment is important to avoid complications.

cta.title: Ready for a natural-looking refinement?
cta.desc: Book your doctor-led assessment at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur. Let's create a plan that honors your unique facial proportions.
cta.quote: Because this is not a "trend treatment." It is a face-balancing decision.
